title: Junior Instructional Designer at Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd!
